metadata.title: Sneaky 2v1 Site Play with Tight Angles and Sharp Shots in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how quick positioning and calm aim turn this 2v1 site fight around. Notice the smart angles and timing that make all the difference.
What’s your favorite spot to clutch on site?

Got a clutch moment like this? Drop your best plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #clutch #fps
